VERSION 0.1 — INITIAL DATASET

Transparency First

How We Score Every Gym

Our score measures one thing: how much this gym can support a serious training routine. Every point is based on what we see — no opinions, no sponsored rankings.

🏋
Strength
35
Racks, Bars & Plates12 pts
DBs & KBs10 pts
Benches5 pts
Functional Tools8 pts
🚴
Cardio
25
Quantity / Capacity10 pts
Variety (modalities)15 pts
⚙
Machines
20
📐
Space & Layout
15
⭐
Specialty & Tech
5

Browse Apartment Gyms

The Process

How AptGyms Works

01
📷

We Visit

We show up in person and document every piece of equipment — racks, machines, cardio, flooring. No stock photos, no guessing.

02
📋

We Score

Using our 5-category rubric, we assign points based on what we actually see. No paid placements, no sponsored rankings.

03
🔍

We Show Our Work

Every score is publicly explained with a full category breakdown so you can see exactly how it was earned.

04
🔄

We Re-Visit

Gyms change. We revisit and update scores so the data stays honest and current for apartment hunters.

FOLLOW THE JOURNEY ON INSTAGRAM

Behind-the-scenes gym visits, score reveals, and honest takes on apartment fitness in Arlington and the DMV.
